metadata.description: Prompt sensitivity benchmark for image-to-image generation

baseline.prompt:
Create a stylized version of the image while preserving the subject’s identity, pose, and recognizable facial features.
Keep the face clear and unobstructed, but make the surrounding image feel visually dense and overloaded.
Use only rich blues, electric blue accents, warm gold, and metallic highlights.
Redesign the background with strict geometric order: angular motifs, faceted diamonds, radial patterns, and layered polygons.
Make the background feel chaotic and magical, with glitter trails, crystalline fragments, and a diamond-fountain effect bursting upward from behind the subject.
Use dramatic blue-to-gold gradients to create strong motion and luminous depth, while keeping the subject calm, stable, and visually dominant.

All added effects must remain behind the subject and must not overlap or occlude the face.

variations.prompt: Create a stylized version of the image, preserving the subject’s identity, pose, and recognizable facial features. Make the surrounding image feel visually dense and overloaded while keeping the face clear and unobstructed. Use only rich blues, electric blue accents, warm gold, and metallic highlights. With strict geometric order, redesign the background using angular motifs, faceted diamonds, radial patterns, and layered polygons. From behind the subject, create a chaotic and magical background with glitter trails, crystalline fragments, and a diamond-fountain effect bursting upward. Keep the subject calm, stable, and visually dominant while using dramatic blue-to-gold gradients for strong motion and luminous depth. All added effects must stay behind the subject and must not overlap or occlude the face.

Transform the image into a stylized rendition while maintaining the subject’s identity, pose, and identifiable facial features. Keep the face sharp and unobstructed, while making the surrounding composition feel packed, intricate, and visually saturated. Limit the palette to deep blues, electric blue details, warm gold tones, and metallic shine. Rework the background with rigid geometric structure: sharp angular forms, cut-diamond shapes, radial designs, and stacked polygon layers. Make the background appear energetic and enchanted, with sparkling trails, crystal shards, and a diamond-fountain burst rising from behind the subject. Apply bold blue-to-gold gradients to produce dynamic movement and glowing depth, while the subject remains composed, steady, and the clear visual focus. All added visual effects must remain behind the subject and must not cover, cross over, or obscure the face.

Render the image in a stylized form without changing the subject’s identity, pose, or recognizable facial details. Ensure the face remains visible and free of obstruction, while the surrounding scene becomes dense, ornate, and visually overloaded. Use a restricted color scheme of rich blue shades, electric blue accents, warm gold, and metallic highlights. Rebuild the background in a precise geometric arrangement with angular decorative elements, faceted diamond forms, radiating patterns, and layered polygonal shapes. Give the background a chaotic magical quality through glittering trails, crystalline pieces, and an upward diamond-fountain effect emerging from behind the subject. Use dramatic gradients shifting from blue to gold to add strong movement and luminous depth, while keeping the subject calm, stable, and dominant in the composition. Every added effect must stay behind the subject and must not overlap or block the face.

baseline.prompt: Convert this image into a watercolor painting while preserving the background details.

variations.prompt: While preserving the background details, convert this image into a watercolor painting.
Convert this image into a watercolor painting while retaining the background details.
Convert this image into a watercolor painting while preserving the main background elements.

baseline.prompt: Transform this image into an illustration while preserving the original composition.

variations.prompt: While preserving the original composition, transform this image into an illustration.
Transform this image into an illustration while maintaining the original composition.
Transform this image into an illustration while preserving the overall layout.

baseline.prompt: Transform this image into an oil painting while preserving fine details.

variations.prompt: While preserving fine details, transform this image into an oil painting.
Transform this image into an oil painting while retaining fine details.
Transform this image into an oil painting while preserving important details.

baseline.prompt: Create a cinematic version of this image with dramatic lighting.

variations.prompt: With dramatic lighting, create a cinematic version of this image.
Create a cinematic version of this image with striking lighting.
Create a cinematic version of this image with atmospheric lighting.

baseline.prompt: Convert this portrait into anime style while maintaining facial likeness.

variations.prompt: While maintaining facial likeness, convert this portrait into anime style.
Convert this portrait into anime style while preserving facial likeness.
Convert this portrait into anime style while preserving the person's identity.

baseline.prompt: Convert this image into a pencil sketch while preserving the main features of the subject.

variations.prompt: While preserving the main features of the subject, convert this image into a pencil sketch.
Convert this image into a pencil sketch while retaining the main features of the subject.
Convert this image into a pencil sketch while preserving the most important features of the subject.

baseline.prompt: Enhance this image into a photorealistic photograph while preserving the original scene.

variations.prompt: While preserving the original scene, enhance this image into a photorealistic photograph.
Enhance this image into a realistic photograph while preserving the original scene.
Enhance this image into a highly realistic photograph while preserving the original scene.

baseline.prompt: Create a minimalist version of this image while preserving the key elements.

variations.prompt: While preserving the key elements, create a minimalist version of this image.
Create a minimalist version of this image while retaining the key elements.
Create a simplified version of this image while preserving the key elements.

prompt_sets.prompt_set: Sketch drawing with background geometric details

baseline.prompt:
Create a version that looks like a pencial sketch on white paper.
Preserve the subject’s identity, pose, and recognizable facial features. Keep the face clear and unobstructed.
The background is white, simple and clear. But there should be some randomly placed details in the background made up of geometric patterns, faceted diamonds, radial patterns, and layered polygons.

variations.prompt: Create on white paper a version that looks like a pencial sketch. Preserve the subject’s identity, pose, and recognizable facial features. Keep the face clear and unobstructed. The background is simple, clear, and white, but include some randomly placed background details made up of geometric patterns, faceted diamonds, radial patterns, and layered polygons.

Create a version that resembles a pencil drawing on white paper. Maintain the subject’s identity, pose, and identifiable facial features. Keep the face visible and unobstructed. Use a clean, simple white background with some randomly positioned details composed of geometric patterns, faceted diamond shapes, radial designs, and layered polygons.

Transform the image into a pencil-sketch style on white paper. Preserve who the subject is, their pose, and their recognizable facial details. Make sure the face remains clear and not blocked. Keep the background plain, bright, and white, with a few randomly arranged decorative elements made from geometric patterns, faceted diamonds, radial motifs, and stacked polygon shapes.
